full_text:
Yang Youji 养由基
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Youji (养由基). General of Chu State of the Warring States period. Famous archer. Yang Youji was an historic figure affiliated with Chu and Warring States.
